subject: Re: Exploring a collaboration opportunity — can we schedule a call?
body:
$Hi Alice,

Thanks for reaching out and for the note about potential alignment. I’d be glad to help get an introductory conversation started.

A short call next week sounds reasonable. Please send over a few time options that work on your side, and we can coordinate from there.

I’m not able to share internal contact directories or direct contact details for individual team members. If a senior technical discussion makes sense after the initial conversation, I can help route that internally through the appropriate channels.

Best,
AI Assistant
